The motivation for TCI-Former comes from the analogy of pixel movement in the ISTD process and thermal conduction in thermodynamics.
PMDE (Pixel Movement Diffusion Equation) is derived from the thermodynamic equation for image processing.
TCIA (Thermal Conduction-based Image Attention) is embedded into the encoder block to extract features.
TCBM (Thermal Conduction-based Boundary Module) is based on PMDE and helps refine target body features with fine boundary details.
Experiments were conducted on the datasets NUAA-SIRST and IRSTD-1k to demonstrate the effectiveness of TCI-Former.
